LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALBERT WATSON'S MOTION FOR INJUNCTION. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. OFF CALENDAR. THE RECORD FAILS TO DISCLOSE THAT PLAINTIFF EVER PROPERLY SERVED THE DEFENDANT WITH A COPY OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IN THIS CASE. WITHOUT SUCH SERVICE, THE COURT CANNOT ENTERTAIN THE MOTION. IN ADDITION, THE COURT REVIEWED THE MOTION AND PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PROVIDE A CLEAR BASIS FOR THE REQUESTED RELIEF. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR 5976

Notice Of Hearing Of Defendant'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Albert Watson, pro per, Tel. 415.524.5015, for plaintiffs;
Rebecca A. Bers, of The Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings on all causes of action alleged in the complaint filed by plaintiff Albert Watson is granted without leave to amend as to all causes of action. Res judicata bars all of Mr. Watson's claims. Mr. Watson previously litigated the same claims in case CGC-14-542926. CCSF prevailed in that prior lawsuit and the judgment is final. All of Mr. Watson's claims are also time-barred because he complains of conduct that occurred over a decade ago and his claims accrued at that time. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR No. 6840; Dept. 302.

For Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ALBERT WATSON, TEL. NO. 1-415-524-5015, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ALBERT WATSON's Motion For Injunction is OFF CALENDAR. The record fails to disclose that plaintiff ever properly served the defendant with a copy of the summons and complaint in this case. Without such service, the court cannot entertain the motion. In addition, the court reviewed the motion and plaintiff fails to provide a clear basis for the requested relief. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ru
